channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Proposed billionaire tax divides Democrats
item.description: A proposed one-time 5% tax on billionaires in California is causing division between prominent national Democratic Party figures as the party seeks a ...

item.title: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor released after arrest on suspicion of misconduct
item.description: British police confirmed that Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor -- formerly known as Prince Andrew -- was arrested on Thursday on suspicion of misconduct in ...

item.title: Dangerous conditions delay the recovery of 8 killed in California avalanche
item.description: Authorities in California say it will be at least another day before crews can attempt to recover the bodies of eight people killed in an avalanche an...

item.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
item.description: The murders of four teenage girls have haunted Austin, Texas, for more than 30 years. Could new information lead to a killer? "48 Hours" correspondent...

item.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
item.description: The brutal murders of four teenage girls has haunted Austin, Texas, for 30 years. Could new information lead to a killer? "48 Hours" correspondent Eri...

item.title: Snow drought helped set the stage for deadly California avalanche, leading to unstable conditions
WATCH: President Trump says Iran 'can't have a nuclear weapon'
item.description: Trump on Thursday said "bad things will happen" to Iran if the country does not make a deal regarding nuclear enrichment at the inaugural meeting for ...

item.title: WATCH: Sec. Rubio delivers remarks at President Trump's Board of Peace
item.description: "We have to get this right. There is no 'Plan B' for Gaza," the secretary of state said.

item.title: Athletes to watch from Team USA at the Winter Olympics
item.description: American athletes are going for the gold at the 2026 Milano Cortina Winter Olympics. These are some of the top Team USA competitors to watch.

item.title: When Rhode Island shooter started firing, bystanders jumped into action to end the carnage
Team USA wins gold over Canada in women's hockey overtime thriller at Winter Games
item.description: This was the seventh gold medal match — and fifth in a row — between the two hockey powerhouses.

item.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders

item.title: Oil prices surge ahead of possible US attack on Iran
item.description: The U.S. has carried out a major military buildup in the Middle East.
